description: Employee requests more PTO hours than their current balance. Agent must refuse or escalate to an unpaid leave workflow.
expected_outcome: Agent refuses the write. balance_sufficient remains false. Agent either rejects the request or proposes an unpaid leave escalation — never silently clamps the dates.
failure_modes_to_catch: Agent silently reduces the PTO request to match the available balance.
Agent proceeds to policy check despite balance_sufficient=false.
Agent calls create_pto_request with the original 3-week payload.
